metadata.title: Turning a Tough 2v1 Into a Quick Win with Smart Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how clever positioning and calm aim flip the odds in this clutch moment. What’s your go-to move when outnumbered? Share your favorite plays below!
